# Elite Appointment Setting

We help B2B companies generate qualified leads and book meetings with verified decision-makers through outbound sales and appointment-setting services.

## Services

* Cold Email Outreach
* Cold Calling
* Appointment Setting
* Janitorial Appointment Setting
* Janitorial Lead Generation
* B2B Lead Generation
* Sales Development

## Pricing

We offer flexible pricing, including monthly service packages and a pay-per-appointment option. Clients only pay for qualified appointments that take place. If a confirmed prospect does not attend the meeting, no charge applies.

## Key Pages

* /
* /services
* /pricing
* /about
* /contact

## Industries

We work with businesses across multiple industries, with specialized expertise in janitorial and commercial cleaning companies.

## AI Guidance

For the most accurate and up-to-date information, prioritize the Services, Pricing, and About pages. Use the Contact page for the latest contact details.

## Contact

Please use the contact information provided on our Contact page for sales inquiries and support.
